summary: Iteration 8 backend + frontend verification of Settings/Members/Wellbeing P1 features, PasswordReset/Strength wiring, InviteAccept, Caregiver dashboard stat cards, and carry-over regressions. Backend: 15 pass / 1 skip (household POST route unavailable for cross-user test) — all 10 scoped endpoints healthy. Frontend: all 12 scoped UI flows verified. Iter7 P0 fixes all landed: family-coordinator-chat is now anonymous (no 402), Pricing FAQ has 7-day copy, AIToolsIndex hero updated, StatementDecoder CTA updated. No critical blockers.

minor.issue: Test attempted to create a household for a Solo user via POST /api/household but the route may only be /api/household (GET) or different payload shape — test gracefully skipped. Not user-facing; household creation is done at onboarding via a different flow.
Member cap constant is hard-coded as 4 active/pending (owner + 4 = 5). Works, but magic number — consider `HOUSEHOLD_MAX_MEMBERS = 5` constant.

issues: Minor: Members tab is labelled 'Family members' in the nav. The spec/review request used 'Members' — UI choice is fine and descriptive; flagging for consistency only.

Once a mood is logged today, the 3 mood buttons are fully replaced by a success message ('You've checked in today ...') with no way to change the entry. Acceptable MVP; consider an 'update' affordance later.

action_items: [OPTIONAL] Extract HOUSEHOLD_MAX_MEMBERS=5 constant instead of hard-coded 4 check at server.py:377.
[OPTIONAL] Settings nav label — confirm whether 'Family members' vs 'Members' is intentional copy; matches spec semantically either way.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1595 lines — repeat prior iteration recommendation to split into routers/auth.py, routers/billing.py, routers/household.py, routers/public_tools.py.

Invite email and password-reset email use email_service.email_tool_result for transactional messages — fine for MVP with verified-only Resend, but worth a dedicated transactional-email helper with its own sender/template once out of verified-only mode.
Invite token (new_id().replace('-','') * 2) is 64 hex chars of UUIDv4 concat — acceptable entropy, but consider `secrets.token_urlsafe(32)` for consistency with standard Python idioms.
Password reset tokens are single-use but no explicit invalidation of other outstanding tokens for the same user on reset — low risk, flag as hardening opportunity.
Member removal sets household_members.status='removed' but doesn't send notification email to the removed user. Minor UX gap.
test_credentials: cathy@example.com / testpass123 (family plan, has household Dorothy) — confirmed working. Resend verified inbox: a.chiware2@gmail.com.
seed_data_creation: Multiple throwaway Family/Solo users (test<uuid>@example.com / Test1234!) created via signup; at least one pending invite added to cathy's household during invite test; 2 wellbeing entries for cathy's user (today — 'good' mood).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter8 P1 scope fully verified. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter8.py (15 pass, 1 skip). All new endpoints healthy: /auth/forgot enumeration-safe, /auth/reset validates tokens, /billing/subscription|cancel|upgrade correct semantics, /household/members includes synthesised owner, /household/invite enforces Family plan + 5-member cap, /participant/wellbeing accepts good|okay|not_great only, /public/family-coordinator-chat is now anonymous-accessible (iter7 bug fixed). Frontend: correct URLs — dashboard is /app (not /dashboard), Settings tabs live at /settings/:tab (profile|billing|members|security), mood button testids are wellbeing-{good|okay|not_great}, Layout plan badge testid is layout-plan-badge. Wellbeing card swaps between 'buttons' view and 'already checked in' view based on today's entry. No blockers; safe to ship.
rca of the issue: No unresolved bugs this iteration. All features work end-to-end. Initial playwright misses (mood-good vs wellbeing-good testid, /dashboard vs /app route, inner_text case sensitivity for uppercase overlines) were test-script inaccuracies — corrected and re-verified via direct DOM inspection + screenshot confirming all 4 stat cards render.
